name: Canopy Registry
description: Canopy product registration prototype built with Gemini.

name: QR Product Verify
description: Consumer-facing product verification page accessed via QR code scan.
openQuestions: Should the CoA link open a real PDF viewer or redirect to the lab's website?
Should there be a 'Report a problem' link for suspected counterfeit products?
How does the QR URL schema work? (e.g., verify.metrc.com/p/{packageTag})

name: Product Search
description: Interactive product search flow with results, selection, and detail view.
openQuestions: Should search results be paginated or infinite scroll?

name: RID Landing Page
description: Consumer-facing Retail ID mobile landing page exploring 4 GTM use cases: compliance-first, compliance+brand, brand-forward, and brand-only.
openQuestions: How does the state seal/logo get uploaded?
Should the campaign banner be dismissible by the consumer?
Which warning messages are required by MA regulation vs. configurable?

prompts.text: Create another version of qr-verify prototype taking Urban Consultants Confluence context into consideration. Need brand-primary, brand-secondary, no-compliance/brand-only options. Research if some states don't need compliance. Use MA, generate fictitious product image.

links.label: Confluence: Mobile Landing Page Discussion with Urban + Consultants

context.summary: Explores the consumer-facing mobile landing page for Retail ID across different state adoption models, based on Urban consultant feedback emphasizing compliance-first positioning and state configurability.

documents.label: Confluence: Mobile Landing Page Discussion with Urban + Consultants
Confluence: Mobile Landing Pages Ideas and Feedback

context.notes: The 'two flavors' GTM model (mandated vs. non-mandated) from the 2026 Roadmap directly informed the 4 use cases.

name: Transfer Manifest
description: Detail view for cannabis product transfer manifests.
openQuestions: Should there be a list/index view for all manifests?
